name: rebound_timer
description: Delayed signal via LTS rebound burst. FS inhibitor has self-excitation (w=15, d=2) creating dense burst firing (~every 2-3 ticks) for quasi-continuous LTS suppression. FS inhibits LTS pair (w=-20) pushing v to ~-85, holding u low. When input ends, FS burst decays, LTS rebounds with burst above baseline rate. Longer inhibition = lower u = stronger rebound. LTS fires spontaneously at tonic 2.5 (b=0.25, rheobase=-0.25). The rebound EXCEEDS baseline rate — downstream detects the rate spike. Use case: delayed after-signal, CPG phase reset, sequence timing.
